prompt: top-down arena shooter, players shoot each other for points

ctx_extensions.name: network.send
ctx_extensions.description: Send a message to the server (or loopback in singleplayer fallback)

ctx_extensions.name: network.onMessage
ctx_extensions.description: Register a callback for a specific server message type

ctx_extensions.name: network.getSessionId
ctx_extensions.description: Returns the local player's unique session ID

ctx_extensions.name: getTerrainHeight
ctx_extensions.description: Returns the ground Y at (x,z). Always 0 for this flat arena but required by harness convention.

ctx_extensions.name: player.getPosition
ctx_extensions.signature: (sessionId?: string) => { x: number, y: number, z: number } | null
ctx_extensions.description: Returns world position of the local player or a specific player by sessionId. Returns null if player not found.

ctx_extensions.name: player.getHealth
ctx_extensions.description: Returns current health (0-100) of local player or specified player

ctx_extensions.name: player.getAllPlayers
ctx_extensions.signature: () => Map<string, { x: number, y: number, z: number, rotation: number }>
ctx_extensions.description: Returns map of all active player positions and rotations keyed by sessionId

ctx_extensions.name: player.respawn
ctx_extensions.description: Teleports the specified player to a random spawn point and resets health to 100

events.name: playerShoot
events.payload: { sessionId: string, originX: number, originZ: number, dirX: number, dirZ: number }

events.name: projectileHit
events.payload: { shooterSessionId: string, victimSessionId: string, damage: number }

events.name: playerDamaged
events.payload: { sessionId: string, newHealth: number, attackerSessionId: string }

events.name: playerRespawned
events.payload: { sessionId: string, x: number, z: number }

mesh_registry.description: Flat rectangular arena floor mesh with grid-line material for spatial reference
Wall segments forming the arena boundary (group of box meshes)
Cover obstacles placed around the arena (box geometry with distinct material)
Template mesh for a player character: small cylinder body with a cone 'nose' indicating facing direction
Small sphere mesh used as bullet template, cloned per active projectile

client_to_server.payload: { x: number, z: number, rotation: number }
{ originX: number, originZ: number, dirX: number, dirZ: number }

server_to_client.payload: { players: Record<string, { x: number, z: number, rotation: number, health: number, score: number }> }
{ sessionId: string, x: number, z: number }
{ sessionId: string, x: number, z: number, rotation: number }
{ sessionId: string, originX: number, originZ: number, dirX: number, dirZ: number }
{ victimSessionId: string, attackerSessionId: string, newHealth: number }

gameplay_spec.win_condition: No fixed win — highest score wins. Optional: first to 20 kills.

contract_warnings: Top-down camera: the harness provides a PerspectiveCamera. The arena module must reposition it to a high overhead view and optionally switch to orthographic if available, or simulate top-down with a high-FOV perspective cam.
Hit detection is client-authoritative for singleplayer fallback. In multiplayer mode the server should validate hits to prevent cheating.
playerShoot event is emitted in start() input handlers, not build(), so all listeners will be registered in time.
Obstacle positions are generated procedurally — all clients must use the same seed (derived from gameState) or receive positions from server.
